diagram_title: Register New LLM Provider in OpenCMS
purpose: Complete registration chain from plugin code to UI visibility — 13 steps across 5 phases covering plugin declaration, provider registry, dynamic model discovery, API exposure, and UI rendering

activities.name: Declare Plugin Entry
activities.description: 在 getInternalPlugins() 陣列中加入新 plugin 的名稱和 import。這是系統知道新 provider 存在的起點。

activities.name: Initialize Plugin Hooks
activities.description: 系統啟動時 Plugin.init() 自動呼叫所有 plugin，觸發 config callback、載入 auth handler。

activities.name: Register Auth Hooks
activities.description: Plugin 回傳 Hooks 物件，宣告 provider ID、token loader、OAuth 登入流程、每次 API 呼叫要加的 header。

activities.name: Declare Provider in Registry
activities.description: 在 supported-provider-registry 加入 key + label，讓 API 層認可這是一個合法的 provider family。

activities.name: Inject Bundled Models
activities.description: 在 initState() 中定義 hardcoded 模型列表（名稱、cost、capability），讓 UI 在無 API 連線時也能顯示。

activities.name: Assemble Provider Catalog
activities.description: Provider.list() 合併 bundled models + dynamic models + disabled 過濾，組裝出完整的 provider 目錄。

activities.name: Discover Dynamic Models
activities.description: 啟動時呼叫 plugin 的 models() hook，取得 runtime 才知道的模型列表（如需要）。

activities.name: Merge Dynamic Models
activities.description: addDynamicModels() 把動態發現的模型合併進 provider state，避免重複。

activities.name: Expose Auth Methods via API
activities.description: ProviderAuth.methods() 從 plugin hooks 萃取 auth 方法，讓前端透過 /provider/auth 取得登入選項。

activities.name: Serve Provider Listing API
activities.description: GET /provider/ 回傳所有 provider + 模型，正規化 family rows，供前端渲染。

activities.name: Persist Model Preferences
activities.description: Model preferences API 讓使用者隱藏或標記最愛模型，狀態持久化在 config。

activities.name: Build Model Selector State
activities.description: 前端 model-selector-state 根據 KNOWN_PROVIDER_FAMILIES 和 PROVIDER_LABEL_MAP 組裝選擇器 UI 資料。

activities.name: Render Provider Configuration UI
activities.description: Workspace console 的 provider-section 元件渲染 provider 設定介面（登入、模型切換等）。

arrows.label: Plugin entry registered in internal plugins array
Bundled model definitions injected into database
Dynamic models discovered from plugin hook
Provider visible and usable in UI
